Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

anybody has a spanish Bhagavad gita to upload...

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-08-15 · 6 answers
a newcomer would like to have one.
user [75] · 2007-08-15
ive asked devotees at mundonamahatta.org, the cong. dev. ministrys web site. in spanish, if they have a soft-copy of BG in spanish. i thought it should be possible to find one at krishna.com, but they dont have it, not even in portugues. they do have other books (portugues) that might be interesting for newcomers, though: http://pt.krishna.com/main.php?id=31
user [24] · 2007-08-15
This might be helpful:

http://www.gitamrta.org/

.
user [24] · 2007-08-15
more specifically:

http://www.gitamrta.org/audio/spanish/bg_spanish.html

..
user [2] · 2007-08-15
It is audio link, which I will send, but what about book download, anyone?
user [38] · 2007-08-16
without Sanskrit:
http://www.spiritual-revolutionary.com/Espanol/BG_espanol/Bhagavad-gita%20tal%20como%20es%20(sin%20diacriticas).doc

courtesy by Google
